description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly black finish and angular, robust construction. The stock is skeletonized, providing reduced weight and a distinctive open-frame appearance, while the grip and foregrip are ergonomically contoured for secure handling. The barrel is long and heavy, suggesting enhanced accuracy and stability, and is fitted with a prominent muzzle brake or compensator at the tip. A detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver, indicating rapid reload capability. The rifle is equipped with a raised optical sight, likely a scope, mounted on the top rail for improved targeting. Subtle yellow accents and paneling add visual interest and a high-tech aesthetic to the overall form.
description: A modern, black tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, heavy barrel, detachable box magazine, and a mounted scope. Yellow accents and ergonomic grips enhance its high-tech, robust appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the skeletonized stock, heavy barrel, scope, and magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle brake, barrel opening, and the alignment of the scope above the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the stock, barrel, and mounted sight.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the open-frame stock and the back of the receiver, with the scope mount visible on top.
